basics.name: Filippo Sallemi
basics.label: Technology Leader & Engineering Architect · iGaming & Affiliates
basics.summary: Deeply technical engineering leader with 15+ years of experience across iGaming and Fintech sectors. Proven track record in scaling engineering organizations and driving technical transformations within fast-paced environments. Expert in cloud infrastructure optimization (19% cost reduction) and automating delivery pipelines (from days to hours using AWS Fargate/ECS). Certified Scrum Master with a strategic focus on AI-driven efficiency — still the person who opens the IDE when it matters.

work.name: Gambling.com Group
highlights: AI Strategy & Governance: Appointed to an elite leadership task force driving the company's transition toward an Agentic-Centric organizational structure.

AI Democratization & Security: Engineered and standardized a secure framework enabling decentralized AI tool creation across the organization — implementing Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers for safe integration of custom AI agents.
19% infrastructure cost reduction through strategic FinOps and cloud workload optimization in the first year.
Delivery Acceleration: Reduced environment provisioning from days to hours by architecting automated pipelines using AWS Fargate/ECS.
Established org-wide architectural standards, IaC (Terraform) adoption, and CI/CD best practices across all engineering teams.

work.name: Gambling.com Group
highlights: Built and managed a cross-functional team of 6 (devs + QA); defined quarterly OKRs and delivery roadmaps aligned with business goals.
Platform Modernisation: Led the full upgrade of the company's core software, reducing codebase by 2/3 — delivered on schedule with zero downtime.
Multiple internal hackathon wins; drove cross-team technical solutions and collaborated with DevOps on performance tuning and infrastructure improvements.

work.name: Videoslots
highlights: Resolved a critical technical impasse that had stalled ADM/AAMS certification for nearly a year, securing the Italian license within 3 months through a ruthless audit and refactoring of compliance protocols.
Optimised high-volume transactional backend in PHP/Laravel handling massive real-time gaming traffic with focus on data integrity and security.

work.name: The Ear Limited
highlights: Scaled engineering org from early-stage to 10+ members; reported to CTO; co-defined technical roadmap and organizational structure.
Casino Aggregator from zero: Integrated 40+ third-party game providers with sub-second latency and high availability under massive transactional load.

Spearheaded the successful migration of a legacy 'spaghetti-code' platform into a modern, scalable architecture within a few months. Managed the full transition of technical debt into a high-performance system while maintaining service continuity.
Managed multi-jurisdiction compliance (MGA, UKGC, Italy, Colombia) — 100% regulatory alignment across all markets.

work.name: Nomad NT
highlights: Founded and ran a technology company for 7 years — full P&L ownership, client acquisition, and end-to-end technical delivery for government and private-sector clients.
Delivered Laravel web platforms, Linux infrastructure, network security systems, and embedded automation projects (maritime/yachts).

work.name: Voismart SRL
highlights: Led a team of 6 developers building the web UI for a VoIP/PBX product; worked extensively with Asterisk, SIP protocol and advanced networking.

projects.name: AI-Enhanced iGaming Aggregator
projects.description: Deployed custom MCP servers connecting a casino aggregator's data layer to LLMs — enabling natural-language querying of betting patterns and automated GGR reports. Implemented autonomous risk analysis without manual SQL overhead.

projects.name: Crypto Payment Gateway
projects.description: Designed and built a direct blockchain payment infrastructure — automated hot/cold wallet management, real-time transaction verification via Webhooks, direct on-chain processing with no third-party dependency. Validated zero-commission payment model as feasible for iGaming platforms.
